name: tournament-certificate-lambda
description: AWS Lambda that renders QuizVerse tournament certificate PDFs + OG images on demand and uploads them to S3. Triggered by the certificate_get RPC's lazy materialisation path.

scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../tournament_certificate.zip . && cd .. && zip -r tournament_certificate.zip node_modules/pdf-lib node_modules/sharp node_modules/@aws-sdk/client-s3 package.json
